leaf_blight.name: Neem & Garlic Spray
preparation: Crush garlic cloves and soak in 2 liters of water overnight
Strain the garlic water
Mix neem oil with liquid soap in a separate container
Add the neem-soap mixture to the garlic water
Add remaining water and mix thoroughly

application.method: Spray on affected leaves and stems, covering both upper and lower leaf surfaces

powdery_mildew.name: Baking Soda & Milk Solution
preparation: Dissolve baking soda in 1 liter of warm water
Mix milk with 2 liters of water
Combine both solutions
Add vegetable oil and remaining water
Stir well until fully mixed

application.method: Spray thoroughly on all crop surfaces, especially affected areas
application.timing: Morning hours when dew has dried
application.duration: Continue until symptoms disappear, then once weekly for prevention

bacterial_spot.name: Aloe Vera & Turmeric Shield
preparation: Extract fresh aloe vera gel and blend with 1 liter of water
Mix turmeric powder and ginger paste in 1 liter of warm water
Combine the aloe solution and turmeric mixture
Add remaining water and stir vigorously
Filter through a muslin cloth

application.method: Spray directly on leaf spots and lesions

rust.name: Fermented Compost Tea
preparation: Soak horsetail in 3 liters of water for 24 hours
Place compost in a cloth bag (tea bag style)
Suspend compost bag in 7 liters of water for 3-5 days (aerated if possible)
Mix the horsetail extract with the compost tea
Add molasses just before application

application.method: Foliar spray and soil drench around crop base

mosaic_virus.name: Buttermilk & Wood Ash Brew
preparation: Mix wood ash in 2 liters of water and let settle overnight
Strain the wood ash water (use the liquid only)
Mix fermented buttermilk with 5 liters of water
Combine ash water and buttermilk solution
Add neem oil and remaining water, shake well

application.method: Spray on leaves to deter vectors and boost immunity

anthracnose.name: Ginger-Garlic-Chili Concentrate
preparation: Grind garlic, ginger, and chilies into a fine paste
Soak paste in 2 liters of water for 24 hours
Filter the extract through a fine cloth
Add liquid soap to the extract
Dilute with remaining 8 liters of water

application.method: Targeted spray on affected fruits and stems
